description: Per-agent selling pages (one template × seven JSON stories): character intro, reserved video slot, example-question → 3-step help journeys, interactive HTML/module demos from the existing library, tips, handoffs, and Ask CTAs. Portal group sibling to story / highlights / Orchestra / Your Hub — not a second chat embed.
principles: One HTML shell + data/greenways-agent-stories/{slug}.json — do not fork seven layouts
Long scroll is OK; cut later if heavy — prefer clear sections over cramming one viewport
Reuse content-modules + existing animated HTML (tickers, trajectory, IoT, map, finders) via embed/iframe or module tablets
Lead with character + video slot; then journeys; then live demos
Every journey ends in Ask {Name} or a module open — never dead-end marketing
Open without sign-in for preview (same as Your Hub v1)
pageSections: How I help journeys (example question + 3-step line diagram) — 2–4 per agent
See it in action (interactive HTML / modules)
Handoff strip (team faces → other story pages + chat)
Sticky / bottom Ask with starter prompts

steps.label: short verb phrase
steps.detail: one line what the agent does

steps.label: short verb phrase
steps.detail: one line + optional handoff or module

waves.name: Remaining six story JSON + portal nav + map links
Illustration embeds polish + video URLs when ready

userStories.title: Agent story shell + Andrieus pilot
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want Andrieus’s story page with intro, video slot, 3-step journeys, and live scheme demos so I understand how he helps before opening chat.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders ≥2 journeys each with exampleQuestion + exactly 3 steps as a line diagram
Video slot visible when videoUrl empty (placeholder copy)
At least one interactive module/HTML demo from illustration library
Ask Andrieus CTA links to /greenways/grants-agent with optional ?q=
Portal nav includes link path to story pages (or Agent stories index)

userStories.title: All seven story JSON + navigation
userStories.description: As a visitor, I can open any specialist’s story from the portal nav or agent map.
acceptanceCriteria: JSON files for all seven slugs under data/greenways-agent-stories/
Agent map / roster links to story pages
Handoff strip links to peer story pages
Each story has ≥2 journeys with 3 steps and ≥1 illustration moduleId

userStories.title: Video URLs drop-in
userStories.description: As ops, I can set videoUrl in JSON and the placeholder becomes the intro video without layout change.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-empty videoUrl renders iframe or video element in the reserved slot
Empty videoUrl keeps poster + coming soon
